name: Gate 1 fires in ENV_REPORT, auto-approve via env, proceeds to TEST_DESIGN
description: Drives loop to ENV_REPORT then fires Gate 1 (owner_gate_id=1) using FORGE_OWNER_AUTO_APPROVE=1. Verifies the gate fires, appends a GATE_APPROVE audit row with from_state=ENV_REPORT and to_state=TEST_DESIGN, and that the loop's current_state becomes TEST_DESIGN. Specifically tests the Gate 1 envelope path (not just the full loop) and verifies owner_gate_id is recorded in the audit row. Plan §2 closure criterion 2.
